reviews.name: Eleanor
reviews.text: Repainted the whole downstairs and the hallway looks immaculate. Tidy, careful, dust sheets everywhere.

reviews.name: Mark
reviews.text: Lovely job on our period sash windows. Proper prep, not just a quick coat over the old paint.

reviews.name: Sophie
reviews.text: Hung a tricky feature wallpaper perfectly. Patient and a real perfectionist.
